migration: Switch to the official installer script from Anthropic docs.
Use new wildcard patterns: Bash(pnpm *) instead of per-command entries.
Install via cargo or download Rust binary. Node/npm package will stop receiving updates.
affects: npm install, CI pipelines using Node codex

migration: Move to gpt-4.1 or gpt-4o in harness model configs.
Split model-specific settings into dedicated config entries.
Use explicit MCP server blocks with per-server credentials.
Migrate to .cursor/rules directory with separate rule files per context.
Migrate to config.yaml with new schema. Run continue migrate to auto-convert.
Update model config to gemini-2.5-pro or gemini-2.5-flash.
affects: Any config specifying gemini-1.5-pro or gemini-1.5-flash

migration: Install Rust-based goose via brew install block/tap/goose or cargo.
affects: pip install goose-ai, Python plugin system

migration: Extension renamed to roo-code. Old id still works but may stop.
affects: VS Code extension installs referencing old id

description: The top-level `provider_aliases` config key is deprecated in favour of `models.aliases`.
migration: Move aliases into `models.aliases` block. Old format still loads but emits a warning on startup.

item: channels using flat token (not plugin block)
description: Old channel format used a flat `token:` key. Channel configs now require a `plugin:` key and nested `config:` block.
migration: Update channel definitions to use `plugin: telegram` + `config: { token: '...' }` structure.

description: Early OpenClaw used MEMORY.md as a structured key-value file. Current best practice is free-form markdown for better semantic search recall via memory_search().
migration: Restructure MEMORY.md as readable markdown paragraphs rather than rigid key: value lines.
